parameters.jsCode:
const replies = $input.all().filter(i => i.json.from || i.json.subject).map(r => ({from: r.json.from || r.json.replyEmail, subject: r.json.subject || '', body: (r.json.body || r.json.text || '').toLowerCase(), receivedAt: new Date().toISOString()}));
return {replies, count: replies.length};
